basics.name: Joe Wojak
basics.label: Senior Technical Writer
basics.summary: Senior Technical Writer with a deep focus on docs-as-code, developer-facing platforms, and complex hardware/software systems. Expertise in establishing documentation departments from the ground up as a first-hire specialist in high-growth tech environments.

work.name: Opentrons
work.summary: Leading documentation for flagship liquid handling robotics systems (Flex and OT-2) and driving the department's transition to modern engineering standards.
highlights: Co-authored the 150-page Flex Instruction Manual and principal author of the OT-2 Instruction Manual.
Authored the Flex Preventative Maintenance and Service Manual, detailing PCBAs and electrical protocols.
Architected and implemented a Docs-as-Code framework using MkDocs and GitHub.
Authored and maintained Python API and G-code documentation.

work.name: Spotify
work.summary: Focused on internal, developer-facing documentation for large-scale system architecture and ad-serving services.
highlights: Developed engineering training tutorials that improved content accuracy and reduced onboarding friction.
Co-authored the internal technical writing handbook and engineering glossary.

work.name: Adobe Systems
work.summary: Managed documentation for high-traffic marketing cloud services.
highlights: Authored and managed documentation for Adobe Audience Manager, including deep-dive API documentation.
Managed documentation for the Adobe Marketing Cloud ID Service.
Mentored international junior writers to maintain global documentation standards.

work.name: Tapad
work.summary: Established the initial documentation function for the company; documented cross-device ad targeting systems and APIs.

work.name: Demdex/Adobe
work.summary: Pioneered the documentation strategy for data management platforms and mobile/API integrations.

work.name: Right Media/Yahoo
work.summary: Contributed to the documentation of the Right Media Exchange, an early pioneer in online ad exchange platforms.

projects.name: Technical Writing Portfolio
projects.description: A personal documentation portfolio and resume site built with MkDocs and Material for MkDocs, deployed via GitHub Pages.
